keyFindings.description: PR has merge conflicts with main — .legion/implement.json and .legion/review.json conflict with IAM commit a0a083e. Implementer must rebase.
newIssues from /state/materialized silently dropped in human-readable legion poll output — formatPollOutput only receives data.issues, not data.newIssues. New issues won't appear in non-JSON output.
newIssuesSinceLastPoll has no deduplication — same issue can appear multiple times if it cycles on/off board between polls.
Handoff/task artifacts (.legion/tasks/bg_*.json, test handoff commits) included in PR diff — internal worker artifacts, add noise.
